face.structure: oval with pronounced cheekbones and a sharp jawline

details: slight upward tilt at the outer corners

face.expression: pensive with a hint of suspicion

skin.texture: smooth with subtle freckles across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: soft matte finish with slight highlights on the cheekbones

hair.style: long and layered with face-framing strands
hair.flow: softly cascading down past the shoulders
details: slight shine on the strands, particularly at the tips

character.aura: mysterious and enigmatic with an underlying intensity

outfit.design: minimalist with functional pockets and subtle stitching detailing
details: faint insignia on the left shoulder
outfit.fit: form-fitting but allows for comfortable movement

composition.framing: mid-length, capturing from the waist up
composition.pose: slightly turned to the side to imply readiness
composition.gesture: right hand softly gripping the edge of the jacket, left arm relaxed at the side

background.rules: keep elements minimal to emphasize character foreground
